tweets.text:
The easiest high stakes decision filter I have is:
"Do what makes you proud, not popular."
The people that say I'm hard on myself typically weren't hard enough on themselves. Before following someones directions, look where their directions got them.

Hard work > Talent
Smart work > Hard Work
Consistent hard work > smart work
Consistent Smart work >hard work

But you gotta do hard work to learn what smart work is. 
And you gotta do it consistently to even see it work to begin with.
